internalName: Veranda Villas & Suites Phuket — Pool Suites
place: Ao Yon, Wichit, Mueang Phuket District, Phuket 83000, Thailand
title: Three-Bedroom Beachside Pool Suite
blurb: A private pool suite within a contemporary resort collection at Ao Yon, Cape Panwa, on Phuket’s south-east coast — chic coastal living with a private pool, sea views and beachfront access. Three-bedroom suites of about 160 m², fully fitted and completed. Two remain available, leasehold, from ฿30,600,000.
detail:
A three-bedroom pool suite within an exclusive seaside collection at Ao Yon, on the lush headland of Cape Panwa at Phuket’s south-eastern tip. Conceived for a cosier, resort-like ambience than the project’s villas, the suites strike a balance between a chic coastal lifestyle and easy, lock-up-and-leave convenience, with interiors by August Design Consultant that carry through the project’s Phuket Old Town accents.

Each suite spans roughly 160 m² of usable space over two levels, with an open-plan living, dining and kitchen area that opens to a private swimming pool and sun deck framing the sea. Three bedrooms and two bathrooms are finished to a fully fitted, move-in-ready standard.

Residents share private beachfront access and the facilities of the adjacent five-star resort — beach club and pool deck, swimming pools, bar and restaurant, fitness, kids’ club and 24-hour security — with on-demand services available (resort facilities are available for a fee).

Two three-bedroom suites remain available, both completed and offered leasehold, at ฿30,600,000 and ฿30,990,000. Cape Panwa is a short drive from Phuket Town and around an hour’s flight from Bangkok.

features.l: Adjacent 5-star resort · beach club, gym, kids’ club
Coastal-chic interiors · Phuket Old Town accents
Cape Panwa / Ao Yon, south-east Phuket
